name: starstream

metadata.name: starstream
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Asynchronous satellite data downloading for CDAWeb, JSOC, etc.

documentation:
![status](https://img.shields.io/badge/status-stable-red.svg) [![license](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) [![code-style](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20style-black-000000.svg)](https://github.com/psf/black) [![pypi](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/starstream)](https://pypi.org/project/starstream) ![CI-CD](https://github.com/Jorgedavyd/StarStream/actions/workflows/CI.yml/badge.svg) ![CI-CD](https://github.com/Jorgedavyd/StarStream/actions/workflows/CD.yml/badge.svg)

Asynchronous satellite data downloading for CDAWeb, JSOC, etc. ## Spacecrafts and datasets ## External dependencies 1. **CDF**: [installation](https://spacepy.github.io/install_linux.html) ## Example ```python from starstream import ACE, DSCOVR from starstream.utils import DataDownloading from datetime import datetime if __name__ == '__main__': DataDownloading( [ ACE(), DSCOVR() ], (datetime(2014, 12, 12), datetime(2014, 12, 30)) ) ``` ## Citation ``` @misc{starstream, author = {Jorge Enciso}, title = {StarStream: An Open-Source Asynchronous Data Downloader}, howpublished = {\url{https://github.com/Jorgedavyd/starstream}}, year = {2024} } ```

methods.name: starstream._base.Satellite._scrap_
documentation:
Defines all URLs to be downloaded in order to complete the query.
Populates:
    local dates (List[void]) -> (List[str])
    self.urls (List[void]) -> (List[str])
    self.paths (List[void]) -> (List[str])

methods.name: starstream._base.Satellite._download_
documentation:
Defines the underlying methods to find the values for each Satellite class.
Changes:
    self.urls (List[str]) -> (List[str | empty]) (pops one element of self.urls)

methods.name: starstream._base.Satellite._prep_
documentation:
Defines the underlying methods to find the values for each Satellite class.
Changes:
    self.paths (List[str]) -> (List[str]) (pops one element of self.paths)

methods.name: starstream._base.Satellite._scrap
documentation:
Defines all URLs to be downloaded in order to complete the query.
Populates:
    local dates (List[StarDate]) -> (List[StarDate])
    self.urls (List[str]) -> (List[str])
    self.paths (List[str]) -> (List[str])

methods.name: starstream._base.Satellite._download
documentation:
Downloads the URLs defined at self._scrap_url.
Changes:
    self.urls (List[str]) -> (List[str]) (pops one URL)

methods.name: starstream._base.Satellite._preprocess
documentation:
Preprocess the data with asynchronous methods.
Changes:
    self.paths (List[str]) -> (List[str | empty]) (pops the path)

methods.name: starstream._base.CSV._process_polars
documentation:
Process data using Polars based on given scrap dates and optional resolution.

Args:
scrap_date (Union[ScrapDate, List[tuple]]): Dates to process.
resolution (Optional[timedelta]): Time resolution for aggregation. If None, no aggregation is performed.
agg_func (Callable): Aggregation function to use. Defaults to pl.mean.

Returns:
List[pl.DataFrame]: List of processed Polars DataFrames.

methods.name: starstream._base.Img._path_prep
documentation: Defines the path scrapping method that is used to get all files.
